title: Matirial Split
description: This is a very simple mod that adds splits (e.x. nuggets) and merges of some matirials.
body:
**List of the new items (with their recipes)**
- Diamond nuggets (1/9 of diamond)
- Netherite Slice (1/2 of netherite scrap)
- Netherite Piece (1/4 of netherite slice)
- Netherite Fragment (1/9 netherite piece)
- Netherite Stack (2 of netherite scrap / 4 of netherite slice)
- Netherite Tower (2 Netherite Stacks)
- Netherite Pile (9 Netherite Towers)
- Netherite Clump (9 Netherite Piles)
  
**List of other recipes**
- Netherite Ingot --> 4 Netherite Scraps
